extortion.description: [AI generated] United Legwear & Apparel Co., based in New York, is an international manufacturer and distributor of legwear, bodywear, and accessory products. They work with popular brands, supplying products ranging from socks, underwear, and sportswear to home goods. Whether in procurement, distribution, or design, the company is dedicated to upholding high-quality, responsible, ethical, and sustainable practices.
